{{Item
| image = Wool collar.png
| id = wool_collar
| type = Customization
| Subtype = Dyeable
| stackable = 64
}}

'''Wool Collar''' is a dyable equipable material that stylizes your dog's collar. This item allows you to craft more variants of collar colors.

[[File:Wool collar display.png|frameless|606x606px]]

== Obtaining ==
=== Crafting ===
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Ingredients
! Recipe
|-
| Strings
| [[File:Wool collar crafting.png]]
|}
== Usage ==
{{Accessory_use}}

== Used In ==
* [[Spotted Collar]]
* [[Multicoloured Collar]]
* [[Beastars's Female Uniform]]

== Trivia ==
It was added in the original Doggy Talents.
